goal: Turn the released architecture kernel into a usable local runtime with hardened adapters, executable eval reporting, and generated harness artifacts.

phases.goal: Turn Pi and opencode spikes into stable runtime APIs with explicit contracts and no harness leakage into core.
Generate MVP-grade integration artifact previews for VSCode, opencode, and Pi, while keeping Claude, Codex, and Kiro as preview-only portability targets unless promoted later.
Expose package-level eval runner APIs through a deterministic CLI with local reports and regression summaries.
Package the first usable local runtime release candidate with hardened adapters and executable eval reporting.

exit_criteria: runtime APIs are stable enough for local use
harness artifacts are generated as previews by default
eval runner CLI produces deterministic local reports
release-0.2.0 is reproducible and fully gated
